caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a white mug featuring red and blue text that reads "BOSS TALK ON!". In the background, a white banner displays the words "URBAN MUSTLE" multiple times, each accompanied by five gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is looking toward someone off-screen to his left, and his expression shifts slightly as he listens and prepares to speak. Across the sequence, the scene remains static with no changes in location or participants; only the man's subtle facial movements and head position change as he engages in a conversation. A small logo is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
